name: @goldfinch/feature-import
description: GoldFinch CSV import feature (P7-6): file pick via the shell FilePicker, local papaparse parsing, interactive column mapping with normalized preview rows, target account selection with inline manual-account creation, batched POST /import/transactions with progress, and a per-row error report (no silently dropped rows). Lives inside the @goldfinch/app Expo workspace; not an independent npm workspace.
